name: Chuletas (Mexican Cocktail Meatballs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except crumbs.
2. Form into small, cocktail-sized balls.
3. Roll balls in bread crumbs.
4. Chill well.
5. Sauté in olive oil for three to four minutes.
6. Transfer to a chafing dish.
7. Serve with your favorite salsa as a dipping sauce.
